label: KingPod V2 — releaseCollateral + swapRssForSusdc

blocked.v1Migrate: Impossible — V1 market 0x50A61cA6… has no releaseCollateral; ~$170k LP stranded
blocked.usdcRedeem: sUSDC vault totalAssets=0 after bootstrap borrow. Swap/burn return sUSDC shares that redeem to 0 USDC until idle USDC is deposited or debt repaid into vault.
blocked.morphoDebt: Still open (~$700k). Needs real USDC to selfDeleverage.

architectureLesson: Option A bootstrap creates paper sUSDC depth then pulls the underlying USDC out to repay the flash. Pool sell cannot print wallet USDC without new external USDC entering the vault.
